channel.title: timeout on IT notes
channel.description: Recent content in timeout on IT notes

item.title: Golang HTTP Timeouts
item.description: If this: http: Accept error: accept tcp [::]:80: accept4: too many open files; retrying in 40ms Check that your go server is using proper timeouts, example: srv := &http.Server{ Addr: ":80", Handler: router, ReadTimeout: 5 * time.Second, WriteTimeout: 10 * time.Second, } log.Fatal(srv.ListenAndServe()) https://blog.cloudflare.com/the-complete-guide-to-golang-net-http-timeouts/
